final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand promotional poster for RAN QIU with a warm autumn atmosphere and poetic, tranquil visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an 东方美学 minimalist aesthetic with natural poetry and warmth — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space and shallow depth-of-field framing — exact framing tightness is yours
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" wordmark as a focal brand element alongside natural autumn elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumnal, golden-hour natural setting — exact scene details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, golden-hour 金色时光 atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (深秋棕红), #E8DCCB (米色), #D4A574 (金棕色) as the dominant palette
Materials/textures: needs a natural, organic surface treatment — exact grain and texture weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve generous white space and warm tone throughout; shallow depth-of-field treatment required
Avoid:
